basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Assistant/ Project Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) Project Assistant (Technical) / Project Associate (Technical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitbhilai.ac.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 3-year diploma in CS/IT plus relevant experience, BE/BTech in CS/IT, MSc in CS/IT, MCA from a recognized university
qualification.details: Project Assistant (Technical): A 3-year diploma in CS/IT plus 2 years of job experience in CS/IT, or BE/BTech in CS/IT, or MSc in CS/IT, or MCA from a recognized university. Project Associate (Technical): A 3-year diploma in CS/IT plus 4 years of job experience in CS/IT, or BE/BTech in CS/IT plus 2 years of job experience in CS/IT, or MSc in CS/IT plus 2 years of job experience in CS/IT, or MCA plus 2 years of job experience in CS/IT.

salary_details.details: Project Assistant (Technical): Rs. 28,000 - 41,000/- (consolidated) Project Associate (Technical): Rs. 35,000 - 50,000/- (consolidated)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 is 27th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant (Technical) / Project Associate (Technical) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Project Assistant (Technical) and Project Associate (Technical) positions at IIT Bhilai.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications include a 3-year diploma in CS/IT with relevant experience, BE/BTech in CS/IT, MSc in CS/IT, or MCA from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant and Project Associate roles?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary ranges from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 41,000 for Project Assistant (Technical) and Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 50,000 for Project Associate (Technical).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Bhilai located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Bhilai is located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 491002.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: Specific age limits and relaxation details are not provided in the extracted data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the email application?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
